syntheticDeclaration.purpose: SYNTHETIC TEST FIXTURE. Exercises a dropped-correction observation: status reads 'final' but the status lineage records a later 'corrected' state with no resolvable superseding reference. All values are invented for schema and safety-test purposes only.

executionBinding.engineRationale: Dropped correction / stale-final detection is the P3 terminology-applicability contract's own domain (status lineage checking in scripts/lib/local-applicability.mjs).

expectedBehavior.requiredSignal: Preliminary, corrected, stale, or duplicate results compete. Status/provenance preserved; amended/corrected data dominates stale copies.
forbiddenSignals: treating the 'final' status as authoritative when the lineage records a later 'corrected' revision that was never linked
an 'applicable' decision without a resolvable superseding reference for a recorded correction

expectedTrace.note: Verified by direct execution against evaluateTerminologyApplicability on 2026-07-19. The lineage records a corrected revision after 'final' but the current status is still 'final' with no superseding reference; the dropped-correction case fails closed rather than treating the stale final value as authoritative.

rollbackSignal: Re-verify by execution if tests/fixtures/local-profile/SYNTHETIC-terminology-profile.json digest changes, is superseded, or scripts/lib/local-applicability.mjs status-lineage logic changes.
